revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: <includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}<!-- -->|<!-- # We have a parameter -->{{#ifexpr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1}}}|BC|plain=false}} > 0<!-- # The year is BC -->|{{#expr:floor({{#invoke:String|replace|{{{1}}}|pattern=^(%d+) ?B?C?$|%1|1|false}} / 10) * 10}}s BC<!-- # The year is AD -->|{{#ifexpr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1}}}|AD|plain=false}} > 0<!-- -->|{{#expr:floor({{#invoke:String|replace|{{{1}}}|pattern=^A?D? ?(%d+)$|%1|1|false}} / 10) * 10}}s<!-- -->|{{#expr:floor({{{1}}} / 10) * 10}}s<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|Parameter 1=''year'' required!}}<!-- --></includeonly><!-- --><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=DECADE here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=DECADE for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}<!-- -->|<!-- # We have a parameter -->{{#ifexpr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1}}}|BC|plain=false}} > 0<!-- # The year is BC -->|{{#expr:floor({{#invoke:String|replace|{{{1}}}|pattern=^(%d+) ?B?C?$|%1|1|false}} / 10) * 10}}s BC<!-- # The year is AD -->|{{#ifexpr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1}}}|AD|plain=false}} > 0<!-- -->|{{#expr:floor({{#invoke:String|replace|{{{1}}}|pattern=^A?D? ?(%d+)$|%1|1|false}} / 10) * 10}}s<!-- -->|{{#expr:floor({{{1}}} / 10) * 10}}s<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|Parameter 1=''year'' required!}}<!-- --></includeonly><!-- --><noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
